reasoning: The sword_iron_v00 is clearly spottable: bright cyan-blue blade with warm gold handle creates strong contrast against the dark reddish-brown dungeon tile background. Locatability is good — the asset pops within 0.5s due to the saturated teal color. Silhouette reads as a sword at a 45-degree dropped-item angle, which is natural but slightly reduces the fastest archetype recognition versus a fully upright orientation. The pixel art style matches the Echoes aesthetic cleanly; no tonal clash with UI or other entities. Dark-area visibility is acceptable — the bright blade holds up on the darker tile zones. Minor issue: the underlying tile texture has moderate visual noise (red-flecked dark tiles) that introduces slight clutter around the sprite edges, but the sword does not disappear into it. Not confused with the creature/echo entity visible in the nearby box. Overall integration is solid but just short of clean pass due to the noisy tile placement and angled silhouette.
